raw_consumer_statement: Ordered an item that arrived damaged. Tried to get the merchant to provide a label to return it since it is huge, and they have been unresponsive and unhelpful so I was forced to dispute the charge. AMEX has handled the dispute process abysmally, clearly outsourcing it to some firm in XXXX that simply doesnt care. First they closed it because they claimed I didnt support any documentation, even though they never asked for it before closing and I left detailed notes. Then I submitted the documentation. Now theyve left me a voicemail saying I need to call a number in the next 24 hours and leave a voice but the number deosnt work saying, " the call does not work due to technical issues. '' I've attached the document I was submit to below. The dispute number is XXXX. There is no protection. They dont care. They send it to a firm who doesnt care and will send a phone number that doesnt work so they can close your dispute.
